title: GTA VI + GPT-6: Rockstar's AI Mechanics Revealed
summary: A YouTube video analyzing GTA VI's actual AI mechanics by examining Rockstar's patents and job postings, debunking viral rumors about GPT-6 integration. The creator argues Rockstar developed a proprietary real-time behavioral simulation system for NPCs rather than relying on OpenAI's models, and provides guidance on distinguishing authentic leaks from false claims.
writeup: The video analyzes GTA VI's NPC AI by examining Rockstar's patents and job postings, and it debunks viral rumors that the game integrates GPT-6. The central claim: Rockstar built a proprietary real-time behavioral simulation system for NPCs rather than relying on OpenAI's models. It also offers guidance for telling authentic leaks from false claims, touching on physics simulation, persistent memory, and test-time compute.
